channel.title: Blog on pwnlentoni
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on pwnlentoni

item.title: From zero to RCE on Prusa HT90
item.description: How an afternoon of poking a 3D printer firmware with a stick turned into full compromise.

item.title: Official CTF Team of the University of Padova
item.description: What started as a group of curious hackers is now the official Capture The Flag team of the University of Padova.

item.title: cornCTF 2025 Results
item.description: The results of cornCTF are in! Here are the top 3 teams
